title: DRIFTHOOK CHAMBERS
attractText:
DRIFTHOOK CHAMBERS

Clear every room.
Wild momentum, heavy bruisers.

STICK  Move / drift
BUTTON 1  Launch hook / start
BUTTON 2  Brake burst

Hit all anchors in a room to purge it.
Bruisers wake and slam when you get close.
Clear the connected chambers.

PRESS BUTTON 1
html: <!DOCTYPE html><html><head><meta charset="UTF-8"><meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"><title>DRIFTHOOK CHAMBERS</title><style>html,body{margin:0;background:#080b12;color:#fff;height:100%;overflow:hidden;font-family:system-ui,sans-serif}body{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}canvas{width:min(96vmin,100vw);height:min(96vmin,100vh);image-rendering:auto;display:block;background:#0b1020;box-shadow:0 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.6)}</style></head><body><canvas id="game" width="960" height="960"></canvas><script>(function(){const c=document.getElementById('game'),x=c.getContext('2d');const W=960,H=960,M=72;window.arcadeInput=window.arcadeInput||{};let audioCtx=null;function beep(f,d,t,v){if(!audioCtx)return;const o=audioCtx.createOscillator(),g=audioCtx.createGain();o.type=t||'square';o.frequency.value=f;g.gain.value=v||0.05;o.connect(g);g.connect(audioCtx.destination);const n=audioCtx.currentTime;g.gain.setValueAtTime(g.gain.value,n);g.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.0001,n+d);o.start(n);o.stop(n+d)}function unlockAudio(){if(audioCtx)return;try{audioCtx=new (window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();}catch(e){}}const rooms={"0,0":{exits:{right:1,down:1},anchors:[[220,220],[740,250],[460,720]],bruisers:[{x:700,y:680,r:54}]},"1,0":{exits:{left:1,down:1},anchors:[[210,280],[740,220],[740,720],[240,700]],bruisers:[{x:480,y:500,r:66}]},"0,1":{exits:{right:1,up:1},anchors:[[230,230],[480,240],[730,230],[480,700]],bruisers:[{x:300,y:560,r:50},{x:690,y:560,r:50}]},"1,1":{exits:{left:1,up:1},anchors:[[220,220],[740,220],[220,740],[740,740],[480,480]],bruisers:[{x:480,y:270,r:52},{x:480,y:690,r:52}]}};let state='title',roomX=0,roomY=0,flash=0,msgTimer=0,totalCleared=0;const player={x:480,y:480,vx:0,vy:0,r:20,hp:5,inv:0,hookCd:0,brakeCd:0};function resetGame(){roomX=0;roomY=0;totalCleared=0;for(const k in rooms){rooms[k].cleared=false;rooms[k].anchorsState=rooms[k].anchors.map(p=>({x:p[0],y:p[1],alive:true,pulse:Math.random()*6.28}));rooms[k].bruisersState=rooms[k].bruisers.map(b=>({x:b.x,y:b.y,vx:0,vy:0,r:b.r,wind:0,cool:90,hp:1,slam:0}));}player.x=480;player.y=480;player.vx=0;player.vy=0;player.hp=5;player.inv=0;player.hookCd=0;player.brakeCd=0;flash=0;msgTimer=0;}resetGame();function curRoom(){return rooms[roomX+','+roomY]}function roomCleared(r){return r.anchorsState.every(a=>!a.alive)}function startGame(){resetGame();state='play';beep(330,.08,'sawtooth',.08);beep(550,.12,'square',.05)}function pressStart(){unlockAudio();if(state==='title'){startGame();return true}if(state==='gameover'||state==='win'){startGame();return true}return false}function clamp(v,a,b){return v<a?a:v>b?b:v}function len(a,b){return Math.hypot(a,b)}function norm(dx,dy){const l=Math.hypot(dx,dy)||1;return [dx/l,dy/l]}function update(){const i=window.arcadeInput||{};if(i.button1Pressed)pressStart();if(state!=='play')return;const r=curRoom();let ax=0,ay=0;if(i.left)ax-=1;if(i.right)ax+=1;if(i.up)ay-=1;if(i.down)ay+=1;if(ax||ay){const n=norm(ax,ay);ax=n[0]*0.72;ay=n[1]*0.72;} player.vx+=ax; player.vy+=ay; player.vx*=0.985; player.vy*=0.985; if(i.button2Pressed&&player.brakeCd<=0){player.vx*=0.35;player.vy*=0.35;player.brakeCd=28;player.inv=Math.max(player.inv,8);beep(180,.08,'triangle',.06);} if(player.brakeCd>0)player.brakeCd--; if(i.button1Pressed&&player.hookCd<=0){let best=null,bd=9999;for(const a of r.anchorsState){if(!a.alive)continue;const d=len(a.x-player.x,a.y-player.y);if(d<bd){bd=d;best=a;}} if(best&&bd<220){best.alive=false;player.hookCd=16;const nx=(best.x-player.x)*0.07,ny=(best.y-player.y)*0.07;player.vx+=nx;player.vy+=ny;flash=8;beep(760,.05,'square',.07);beep(440,.1,'triangle',.05);if(roomCleared(r)&&!r.cleared){r.cleared=true;totalCleared++;msgTimer=45;beep(280,.07,'sine',.08);beep(420,.09,'sine',.07);beep(640,.12,'sine',.06);if(totalCleared===Object.keys(rooms).length){state='win';beep(520,.15,'sawtooth',.07);beep(780,.25,'square',.05);}} }else{player.hookCd=10;beep(160,.05,'square',.04);} } if(player.hookCd>0)player.hookCd--; player.x+=player.vx; player.y+=player.vy; const door=96; if(player.y>H-M && player.x>W/2-door&&player.x<W/2+door&&r.exits.down){roomY++;player.y=M+24;player.vy=Math.min(player.vy,0);beep(240,.06,'sine',.05);} else if(player.y<M && player.x>W/2-door&&player.x<W/2+door&&r.exits.up){roomY--;player.y=H-M-24;player.vy=Math.max(player.vy,0);beep(240,.06,'sine',.05);} else if(player.x>W-M && player.y>H/2-door&&player.y<H/2+door&&r.exits.right){roomX++;player.x=M+24;player.vx=Math.min(player.vx,0);beep(240,.06,'sine',.05);} else if(player.x<M && player.y>H/2-door&&player.y<H/2+door&&r.exits.left){roomX--;player.x=W-M-24;player.vx=Math.max(player.vx,0);beep(240,.06,'sine',.05);} const nr=curRoom(); const wallPush=(side)=>{beep(90,.03,'square',.03); if(side==='l'||side==='r')player.vx*=-0.35; else player.vy*=-0.35;}; if(!(player.x>M|| (nr.exits.left&&player.y>H/2-door&&player.y<H/2+door))) {player.x=M;wallPush('l')} if(!(player.x<W-M|| (nr.exits.right&&player.y>H/2-door&&player.y<H/2+door))) {player.x=W-M;wallPush('r')} if(!(player.y>M|| (nr.exits.up&&player.x>W/2-door&&player.x<W/2+door))) {player.y=M;wallPush('u')} if(!(player.y<H-M|| (nr.exits.down&&player.x>W/2-door&&player.x<W/2+door))) {player.y=H-M;wallPush('d')} for(const b of nr.bruisersState){const dx=player.x-b.x,dy=player.y-b.y,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy); if(b.wind>0){b.wind--; if(b.wind===0){const n=norm(dx,dy); b.vx=n[0]*13; b.vy=n[1]*13; b.slam=18; beep(110,.1,'sawtooth',.08);} } else if(b.cool>0){b.cool--; if(d<250&&b.cool<45){b.wind=28;}} b.x+=b.vx; b.y+=b.vy; b.vx*=0.92; b.vy*=0.92; b.x=clamp(b.x,M+b.r,W-M-b.r); b.y=clamp(b.y,M+b.r,H-M-b.r); if(player.inv<=0&&d<player.r+b.r+4){player.hp--;player.inv=70; const n=norm(dx,dy); player.vx=n[0]*10;player.vy=n[1]*10; flash=16; beep(70,.18,'sawtooth',.08); if(player.hp<=0){state='gameover';beep(60,.3,'triangle',.08);} } } if(player.inv>0)player.inv--; if(flash>0)flash--; if(msgTimer>0)msgTimer--; } function drawRoomFrame(r){x.strokeStyle='#7fd';x.lineWidth=8;x.strokeRect(M,M,W-2*M,H-2*M); x.fillStyle='#18304a'; x.fillRect(M-8,M-8,W-2*M+16,16);x.fillRect(M-8,H-M-8,W-2*M+16,16);x.fillRect(M-8,M-8,16,H-2*M+16);x.fillRect(W-M-8,M-8,16,H-2*M+16); const door=96; x.fillStyle='#0b1020'; if(r.exits.up)x.fillRect(W/2-door,M-12,door*2,24); if(r.exits.down)x.fillRect(W/2-door,H-M-12,door*2,24); if(r.exits.left)x.fillRect(M-12,H/2-door,24,door*2); if(r.exits.right)x.fillRect(W-M-12,H/2-door,24,door*2);} function render(){x.fillStyle=flash?`rgb(${20+flash*10},${10+flash*6},${30+flash*8})`:'#0b1020';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H); for(let s=0;s<70;s++){const px=(s*137)%W,py=(s*211+(performance.now()*0.02*s))%H; x.fillStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)'; x.fillRect(px,py,2,2);} if(state==='title'){x.fillStyle='#10192f';x.fillRect(90,120,780,720);x.strokeStyle='#7fd';x.lineWidth=6;x.strokeRect(90,120,780,720);x.fillStyle='#fff';x.textAlign='center';x.font='bold 76px sans-serif';x.fillText('DRIFTHOOK',480,260);x.fillText('CHAMBERS',480,340);x.font='30px sans-serif';x.fillStyle='#9fe';x.fillText('Clear every room. Drift like a bad idea.',480,420);x.fillStyle='#fff';x.font='26px sans-serif';x.fillText('STICK  MOVE / DRIFT',480,520);x.fillText('BUTTON 1  HOOK NEAREST ANCHOR',480,565);x.fillText('BUTTON 2  BRAKE BURST',480,610);x.fillStyle='#fda';x.fillText('Bruisers telegraph, then slam hard.',480,680);x.fillStyle=(Math.floor(performance.now()/400)%2)?'#fff':'#7fd';x.font='bold 42px sans-serif';x.fillText('PRESS BUTTON 1',480,770);return;} const r=curRoom(); drawRoomFrame(r); x.textAlign='left';x.fillStyle='#fff';x.font='bold 28px sans-serif';x.fillText('HP '+player.hp,90,48);x.fillText('ROOM '+(roomX+1)+','+(roomY+1),220,48);x.fillText('CLEARED '+totalCleared+'/4',390,48); if(msgTimer>0){x.textAlign='center';x.fillStyle='#7fd';x.font='bold 42px sans-serif';x.fillText('ROOM PURGED',480,100);} for(const a of r.anchorsState){if(!a.alive)continue; a.pulse+=0.08; const pr=18+Math.sin(a.pulse)*4; x.fillStyle='#ffd54a'; x.beginPath();x.arc(a.x,a.y,pr,0,7);x.fill(); x.strokeStyle='#fff5b0';x.lineWidth=4;x.stroke(); x.beginPath();x.moveTo(a.x-pr-8,a.y);x.lineTo(a.x+pr+8,a.y);x.moveTo(a.x,a.y-pr-8);x.lineTo(a.x,a.y+pr+8);x.stroke(); } for(const b of r.bruisersState){x.fillStyle=b.wind>0?'#ffb347':'#d64f4f';x.beginPath();x.arc(b.x,b.y,b.r,0,7);x.fill();x.strokeStyle='#fff';x.lineWidth=4;x.stroke(); x.fillStyle='#2b0e0e';x.fillRect(b.x-b.r*0.45,b.y-10,b.r*0.9,20); if(b.wind>0){x.strokeStyle='rgba(255,180,71,0.9)';x.lineWidth=6; x.beginPath();x.arc(b.x,b.y,b.r+12+(28-b.wind)*0.8,0,7);x.stroke();}} if(player.hookCd>10){x.strokeStyle='#7fd';x.lineWidth=3;x.beginPath();x.arc(player.x,player.y,36,0,7);x.stroke();} x.fillStyle=player.inv>0&&Math.floor(player.inv/4)%2?'#fff':'#7fd';x.beginPath();x.arc(player.x,player.y,player.r,0,7);x.fill(); x.strokeStyle='#003b46';x.lineWidth=4;x.stroke(); const vx=player.vx*5,vy=player.vy*5; x.strokeStyle='rgba(127,255,221,0.4)';x.lineWidth=5;x.beginPath();x.moveTo(player.x,player.y);x.lineTo(player.x-vx,player.y-vy);x.stroke(); if(r.cleared){x.textAlign='center';x.fillStyle='rgba(127,255,221,0.8)';x.font='bold 34px sans-serif';x.fillText('EXIT OPEN - CLEAN ROOM',480,910);} if(state==='gameover'||state==='win'){x.fillStyle='rgba(0,0,0,0.55)';x.fillRect(0,0,W,H);x.textAlign='center';x.fillStyle=state==='win'?'#7fd':'#ff8d8d';x.font='bold 80px sans-serif';x.fillText(state==='win'?'ALL CHAMBERS PURGED':'DRIFT WRECKED',480,390);x.fillStyle='#fff';x.font='34px sans-serif';x.fillText(state==='win'?'Button 1 to run it again':'Button 1 to retry',480,470);} } function loop(){update();render();requestAnimationFrame(loop)} loop();})();</script></body></html>
